hero_title: Turning data into systems that scale.
hero_subtitle: Building data-driven systems and developer tools with Rust, Python, and SvelteKit.
about_p1: Mathematics graduate from Galatasaray University with a perfect-scored thesis on Reinforcement Learning. I combine a strong academic foundation in data science, optimization, and machine learning with hands-on experience building enterprise systems and cloud platforms.
about_p2: My academic curriculum was delivered entirely in French over four years, giving me a multilingual perspective that shapes how I approach international engineering challenges.
exp_otokoc_d1: Contributed to backend development of enterprise ERP systems using .NET and SQL Server, supporting finance and operational domains.
exp_otokoc_d2: Developed and optimized T-SQL stored procedures for operational workflows, reporting pipelines, and data transformation processes.
exp_otokoc_d3: Designed complex queries across highly relational schemas to support system operations and analytical reporting.
exp_otokoc_d4: Built SSIS packages to automate recurring data integration and ETL processes.
exp_otokoc_d5: Developed SSRS reports used by business teams for operational monitoring and decision-making.
exp_otokoc_d6: Collaborated on 20+ deliverables using Agile methodologies and Azure DevOps with cross-functional teams.
exp_vakif_d1: Analyzed financial and operational datasets using SQL and Python to support senior management decision-making.
exp_vakif_d2: Developed structured reports and dashboards using business intelligence tools for data visualization.
exp_vakif_d3: Collaborated with finance and compliance teams to streamline data workflows and ensure regulatory alignment.
project_klauthed_desc: Enterprise-grade multi-tenant Identity Provider platform competing with Auth0, Clerk, and Azure AD. Designed for 10K to 1M+ monthly active users.
project_klauthed_h2: OAuth/OIDC, social login, MFA, custom domains
project_klauthed_h3: SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR, ISO27001 compliance targets
project_klauthed_h4: CockroachDB, Redis Cluster, NATS JetStream, ClickHouse
project_scivex_desc: A comprehensive Rust library replacing the entire Python data science ecosystem with a single, from-scratch Cargo workspace. Pure Rust, zero external math dependencies.
project_scivex_h1: 13 sub-crates: tensors, DataFrames, ML, neural networks, visualization, and more
project_scivex_h3: Implements BLAS, LAPACK, FFT from first principles
project_scivex_h4: Replaces NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, scikit-learn, PyTorch, Matplotlib in one crate
project_pm_desc: Multi-tenant SaaS property management platform with clean architecture. Manages 100+ property listings with automated rent tracking, expense analytics, and tenant management.
project_pm_h1: 5-layer clean architecture with CQRS and MediatR
project_pm_h2: 169 tests across application and API layers
project_pm_h3: Multi-tenancy with row-level isolation, JWT auth, Redis caching
project_spacex_desc: Classification models predicting first-stage landing success from launch telemetry data, with end-to-end data pipeline and interactive geospatial visualizations.
project_spacex_h1: 85% accuracy with Logistic Regression, SVM, Decision Trees, KNN
project_spacex_h2: Full pipeline: API collection, cleaning, feature engineering, cross-validation
project_spacex_h3: Interactive maps and charts with Folium and Plotly
project_da_desc: Multi-dataset analysis covering housing price prediction, customer segmentation, and market trend classification with statistical methods.
project_da_h1: Regression, K-Means clustering, and classification across real datasets
project_da_h2: Statistical hypothesis testing and feature selection for model interpretability
edu_gsu_h2: Advisor: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Ayşegül Ulus
edu_gsu_h4: Mathematics Club Board Member, Photography Club Board Member
contact_description: I'm always open to new opportunities, collaborations, and interesting conversations. Feel free to reach out.
hero_about: Mathematics graduate from Galatasaray University. I build data-driven systems and backend solutions — from classification models and analytical dashboards to full-stack platforms managing real users and real revenue. End-to-end ownership, from data modeling to production deployment.
hero_focus_items: Backend Systems · Data Science · ML & Analytics · Cloud Platforms
